title: acokanthera spectabilis
intro: Acokanthera spectabilis, also known as the red milking vine or poison arrow plant, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its red, milky sap and striking white and green flowers. The plant's milky sap contains a toxic compound called ouabain, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including treating heart conditions and lowering blood pressure. The health benefits of Acokanthera spectabilis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce hypertension, and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its toxic properties.
